title: Deliciously Dense Polish Goats Cheese Casserole
description: A rich and savory one-pot Polish dish featuring goats cheese, infused oil, and a glassy-jelly texture, perfect for a flexitarian-friendly dinner option.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 180 degrees Celsius.
In a large cazuela, heat the infused oil over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and saute until translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the mushrooms and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown.
In a small bowl, whisk together the flour and a splash of the vegetable broth until smooth.
Add the flour mixture to the cazuela and stir to combine.
Add the remaining vegetable broth, dried thyme, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Crumble the goats cheese into the cazuela and stir until well combined.
Transfer the cazuela to the preheated oven and bake for 25 minutes, or until the casserole is hot and the cheese is melted and glassy.
